title: From the Fog+
description: A modpack based of From the Fog and many other horror mods | 1.20.1
body:
**In this modpack you will find stalkers, dwellers and more such as _Man from the Fog_, _Herobrine_ and the _Cave Dweller_.**

### **A new version is being worked on**

The main mods used in the pack are:
- [Man From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-man-from-the-fog)
- [From the Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Cave Dweller Evolved](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [The Box of Horrors](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-box-of-horrors)

The full mod list is under the individual version pages.
